abilities: Don't be such a diva! (hacking D.Va )
Don't lose your temper now. (hacking Reaper )
Getting rusty, old man? (hacking Reinhardt , Sigma , Soldier: 76 or Torbjörn )
Stay where I can see you. (hacking Tracer )
Who called pest control? (hacking Wrecking Ball )
chatter: In my world, there are no secrets.
Hah, let's get started. Got a lot of systems that need hacking.
Hm... I think I can make this worth my time.
I'm hoping for an easy mission. Don't make this harder than it needs to be.
Easy in, easy out. Let's get the job done.
Quick and quiet. Let's get it done.
Winning's pretty fun, right? Keep it up.
How about we try winning this time?
I've had worse missions, but this is pretty bad.
Trying to keep me out? I don't think so.
*chuckle* They really have it out for me...
Is everyone napping? What's going on?
Agh! Little light on teammates right now!
I don't think they got the hint.
So dramatic. (witnessing Reaper use Death Blossom)
Someone has to pull their weight around here...
call-outs: Sniper! I'd keep my head down.
There's someone else sneaking around here.
Keep it together. We're almost there.
Not long now. We can pull this off.
Think they're nervous? We're about to win, after all.
Tick tock. If we're hoping to win, now's the time.
Time's up, amigos. We're not quitting, are we?
eliminations: Amateur hour.
Sorry, but you didn't make the cut.
That made my day!
That's it?
We can still be friends, right?
Who invited the amateur?
You make great target practice.
You were boring me.
You know better than to turn your back on me. (eliminating Baptiste )
I'm ready now. Are you? (eliminating Emre )
Aw, I'll send my condolences to Max . (eliminating Freja )
Quiet, now. (eliminating Junkrat )
(Spanish: What a pretty cat you are.) (eliminating Jetpack Cat )
Welcome to Earth. (eliminating Juno )
That was for our friend . (eliminating Mauga )
Don't take it so seriously. (eliminating Reaper )
Ay. Sorry, Gabe... (eliminating Reaper )
Smoked. (eliminating Reaper )
Cheers, love. * laughs * (eliminating Tracer )
You had that coming. (eliminating Vendetta )
(Spanish) Ugh, so analog. (eliminating Venture )
Ah, I'm sure you'll get me next time. (eliminating Widowmaker )
Like stealing data from Athena . (eliminating Winston )
Katya will be so disappointed. (eliminating Zarya )
Guess you were vulnerable.
*chuckle* Hijacked.
That malware's bad stuff!
Trampled by the Trojan horse.
How do you like my upgrades? (eliminating Emre )
Aw, the bug killed the spider! (eliminating Widowmaker )
Guess I'm better at range than I thought! (long-range elimination)
Hah! Not very "ultimate," if you ask me. (eliminating enemy during their ultimate)
Didn't expect me, huh? (eliminating enemy while airborne from Translocator)
I'm always at the right place at the right time. (eliminating enemy while airborne from Translocator)
Cass, we've seen your tricks. No more. (eliminating Cassidy using Deadeye)
Tell your puppet master I'll find them. (eliminating a hacked Emre using Override Protocol)
You know what, maybe I could be a ninja. (eliminating Genji or Kiriko while jumping)
I know how to sniff out a rat. (eliminating Junkrat using RIP-Tire)
*laugh* Your mom helped me do that. (eliminating Pharah while Nano-Boosted by a friendly Ana )
Ay, Siebren. Don't you see it's me? (eliminating Sigma using Gravitic Flux)
Cute trick! But it was mine first. (eliminating another Sombra using Translocator)
Of course I detected you. (eliminating another Sombra using Stealth)
Teleport wars... always a good time. (eliminating another Sombra using Translocator or Tracer using Blink)
Caught you right out of the air, Amélie . (eliminating airborne Widowmaker )
You're so jumpy, Winston. (eliminating Winston using Jump Pack)
*yawn* Are we still fighting?
Good warmup.
Seriously?! It's like they aren't even trying!
Didn't even break a sweat!
Group bypass!
I always have the upper hand.
Multiple users down!
Watch and learn.
No one left standing!
That wasn't as bad as I thought it would be.
I don't leave loose ends.
You look like you've seen a ghost!
You know better than that, Lacroix! (eliminating Widowmaker )
And I thought you were the hero.
Don't worry; you'll pay me back.
Hey! Be more careful next time!
I know. I'd gawk too.
Knowing me has its perks.
I've got your back, "traitor". (assisting Baptiste )
I think that's worth a raise. (assisting Doomfist )
Use your eyes, meat head... (assisting Mauga )
Our interests are aligned today... (assisting Reaper )
Here for you, Spider Queen! (assisting Widowmaker )
A sucker for my punch.
Who said you can get this close?
You're cuter up close.
Clank off. (eliminating an omnic or Genji )
Lights out, amiga. (eliminating Illari )
Boop! Too slow. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Aww, did I do that?
It's a long way down!
Mind the gap!
Misstep? More like "mistake".
You really let me down.
Nyoooom.... *crash noise*
*laughs*
Enemy turret destroyed.
Enemy turret offline.
I knew you were good for something.
For you? Good enough.
Ooh, somebody's tough.
(Spanish: Ha! Kid's tougher than they look!)
No wonder they're after you. (to Baptiste )
You haven't lost your edge, after all! (to Baptiste )
Talk about overkill. (to Mauga )
Eugh. Hate to be on the wrong end of your scalpel. (to Moira )
All hail the Spider Queen! (to Widowmaker )
interactions: Sombra : You like beaches, right, Ana? We should do a girls' trip to Tulum! Ana : Mm... What's it going to cost me? Sombra : For you, amor? No charge.

Ashe: You still have any contacts with Los Muertos ? Sombra: I might. What's in it for me? Ashe: I'd offer you money, but I don't think that's what you're after. Sombra: No. So... any good stories about the cowboy ?
Sombra : Where have you been all these years, Baptiste? Baptiste : You act like you don't know. Sombra : *laughs* This is why I like you.

Sombra : You're with Overwatch now? I thought you didn't do commitment. Baptiste : You know I'm full of surprises. Sombra : Qué dulce. Could you "surprise" them by planting a few bugs for me? Baptiste : Even for you, sweetheart... I have to pass.

Baptiste : Is it true? You're out of Talon ? For good? Sombra : For now. Until someone knocks the new boss down a few pegs. Baptiste : Well, if you're looking for help... you can always come find me. Sombra : Aww. Aren't you sweet? But something tells me your new friends won't enjoy having me around.
Sombra : Did you know you have a locked storage drive? Bastion : *inquisitive beeps* Sombra : *whistle* Good encryption. You should be proud. Bastion : *proud beeps*
Sombra : There's no easy way to say this... I read your poetry folder. Brigitte : What?! I... you had no right! Sombra : Don't yell at me. We're both victims here.

Sombra : Every time I need a laugh, I look at your search history. Cassidy : *sigh* Let me guess. Last night, around dinner time? Sombra : "Cactus spines in butt. How get rid of?" Cassidy : Was I supposed to leave 'em in there?!
Cassidy : We should catch up sometime soon. Sombra : Heh, why? I already know what you've been up to. Cassidy : ...But I don't. Sombra : And the problem is?
Sombra : Caught your stream last night, conejita. You're not bad at those games. D.Va : "Not bad"? I'll stomp you even with your hacks! Sombra : Aw. I'll be sad when we take you out.
Sombra : Oh, they're all gone? I didn't even use my best tricks! D.Va : Come on, they're not even trying!
Echo : Any luck getting past my fourth firewall yet? Sombra : Already done. Your fifth's tricky, though. Echo : Do you want a hint? Sombra : *scoff* Don't you dare!

Sombra : Give it up, güey. You think I don't know who you're really working for? Emre : What makes you think I know? Sombra : *scoff* Please. Don't play dumb with me. Emre : *exasperated chuckle* No "playing". Just dumb.
Sombra : You secretive types are so much fun to expose. Freja : You think I don't cover my tracks? Sombra : Come on, encanto. You know there's always a trail.

Sombra : You need to tell me everything you've learned about that friend of yours . Freja : Like hell I do. Sombra : I'll find what I need eventually. It's up to you how painful it'll be. Freja : Touch him, and you'll learn what "pain" really means.
Hazard : Best quit poking around my files, lass. You cannae out-hack Phreak firewalls. Sombra : Hard to call it "hacking" when the password is your dog's birthday.

Illari : Did you see my last information request? Sombra : I did. Aren't you taking on too much, chica? Illari : That's for me to decide, not you. Sombra : *sigh* I'll send you the relevant details...
Sombra : Seems like the virus worked. How are you holding up? Illari : *sigh* I'm trying not to think about it. Sombra : Lo siento, chica. If there was another way, I would have found it.

Sombra : There's nothing about you in my files. No images, no documents, nothing. Junker Queen : Yeah, well, I'm... what's the word? Starts with E? Sombra : Enigmatic? Junker Queen : That's the one, and don't you forget it.

Sombra : Lucheng 's files on Mars are locked down tight. I had to take a break from cracking them. Juno : I am not surprised. Apparently, it was a very secret project . Sombra : Now you've got me curious again. I'll visit their firewalls later.
Sombra: You'll never guess what I heard when I tapped the Hashimoto's calls. Kiriko: I don't do guesses. What's your price? Sombra: *tongue click* I have a feeling we're going to get along.

Sombra : Pobrecito... I don't know how you manage to scrape by on those million dollar wires from Mom and Dad. Lifeweaver : You mean the million dollar wires I forward to wildlife charities? Sombra : Ay, come on! You've got to have some dirt on you. Lifeweaver : Only when I'm gardening, I fear.
Lúcio : So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: what is your favorite animal? Sombra : I love those deep sea animals. Like the bigfin squid? Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Mauga : I hear you can find just about anyone. Sombra : Mauga, no. Mauga : Hey, I know you miss him too. We could have a little party! Sombra : You're bad for him in every way that counts.

Sombra : Try not to destroy anything valuable this time. Mauga : Is someone still mad I burnt down the server room? Sombra : I lost a lot of bank account numbers, and my favorite pizza recipes! Mauga : Not the pizza!

Mauga : I can't believe you ditched Talon ! All my buddies are leaving me behind... Sombra : I'm not taking orders from some self-righteous maniac. Oh, and I'm not your buddy. Mauga : Wha-- *sniffle* No... not anymore...
Sombra: That fox girl asked for more Hashimoto intel. Think I should tell her the truth? Mizuki: Only if you're prepared to regret it.
Sombra: Your friends might be fooled by your little act, but I know a liar when I see one. Mizuki: I'm not lying. Just not telling the whole truth. Sombra: Sure, whatever helps you sleep at night.

Sombra : You and jefe need to stop frying Sigma 's brain! Moira : I'm trying to help your little friend. Sombra : *scoff* And yourself. Moira : Yes, let's discuss morality. And hypocrisy, while we're at it.
Sombra : What are you up to, Moira? Moira : Wouldn't you like to know? Sombra : Fine. I'll hack you later.
Sombra : You ever broken patient confidentiality? Moira : I can't say. Sombra : You're good ...
Sombra : This carpal tunnel's slowing down my WPM. Moira : I can fix it, and more. Sombra : Uh, how about just taping it up? Moira : Offer's on the table.
Sombra : You stopping in to see Max ? I love how you make him squirm. Moira : Mm, it's amusing. I don't even experiment on omnics . Sombra : ...Yet? Moira : *laughs* Yet.
Sombra: So, how much RAM do you have... RAMattra? Ramattra: Do humans find comfort in such petty humor? Sombra: Just trying to break the ice.
Sombra : Wanna know what Martina 's been up to? Reaper : Not interested. Sombra : Hmm, that's not what my tracker says...
Reaper : We need to be careful. If Vendetta finds us, we're dead. Sombra : Uh, who's 'we'? You're the one who kill her old man . Reaper : If I go down, I'm taking you with me.

Reinhardt : Sombra, something is wrong with my phone. It is so slow! Sombra : I'm not tech support, big guy. Reinhardt : I know, I know. I'm just not very good with computers. Sombra : *sigh* Have you tried turning it off and on?

Sigma : Hm? Ah, there you are, my friend! Sombra : What, are you surprised to see me? Sigma : Well, it's not unlike you to disappear without warning. Sombra : Someone has to keep you from wandering off!

Sombra : Are you okay, viejito? You don't look so good. Sigma : *sigh* I... I am afraid... conditions have... worsened in your absence, my friend. Sombra : *sigh* Hang in there, okay? I promise I'll get you away from her .
Sigma : Hm... why does this place feel familiar? Sombra : We've been here, viejito. This is where Max lives. Sigma : Ah, yes, Maximilien! His collection of Greek sculptures is quite charming.
Sigma : My friend, you are from around here, no? Sombra : I used to be, yeah. Sigma : But... how could one's place of origin change? Sombra : Let's hope you never know what I mean.
Sombra : Moira 's not around... think she's hiding anything in her lab? Sigma : Ah... The doctor would likely prefer we respect her privacy. Sombra : Ay, you're so boring, viejito!
Sigma : Ha! Magnificent electromagnetism! Sombra : You were pretty magnificent yourself, Doc.

Sombra : The boss was talking to Moira the other day. Kept looking over at you. Sigma : Ah, yes! He wanted the doctor to run some... "non-invasive" tests. Sombra : Ay... You come to me if they try anything, okay?
Sombra : Vivian Chase. Your Overwatch record was spotless. And your retirement was just as quiet, right? Sojourn : It was. And I plan to keep it that way.

Soldier: 76 : If we're working together, I won't tolerate you playing games with me. Sombra : Ay, relax! What, you don't trust me? Soldier: 76 : I don't trust anyone. Not anymore. Sombra : Hm. Then we'll get along, after all.

Soldier: 76 : How long have you been after this mystery we're chasing ? Sombra : Let's just say I was someone else entirely when I fell down this rabbit hole. Soldier: 76 : Heh, I guess I know what you mean.
Symmetra : What more do you know about LumériCo and Vishkar ? Sombra : Ooh... is the little birdie finally leaving her cage? Symmetra : Do not jump to conclusions.
Sombra : Can I interest you in some juicy gossip? Torbjörn : Spare me your fishy information. Sombra : Aw. Not interested in Volskaya's latest plans? Torbjörn : Fine. But just a few blueprints!

Tracer : Ugh. Entered my passcode too quick and now I'm locked out of my phone! Sombra : I can unlock it for you, cariño. Tracer : Thanks, love! Oh-- wait. You tryna pull a fast one on me? Sombra : Hm. You're smarter than you look.
Sombra : Of course I left. You're burning the world down! Vendetta : Flee, then. May you waste your life outrunning your regret.

Venture : So... you haven't been in touch since Ilios . Sombra : Be patient, escuincle. You aren't the only piece in this puzzle. Venture : But what kind of puzzle? Lockbox, ancient riddle, jigsaw? Sombra : *sigh* Whatever kind makes you stop asking questions.

Sombra : Hah! Time to do some digging. Venture : Oh, sweet! What are we digging for? Sombra : Security flaws, restricted data... blackmail material... Venture : Oh. Not artifacts, or, uh... yeah. Totally fine.
Sombra : Your abuela doesn't live far from here, right? Venture : What? How'd you know that? Sombra : I know everything about you. Venture : Wow. ...That's actually really cool. Sombra : ¿Verdad?
Sombra : How about we call a truce? Widowmaker : How about I call a mortician?

Sombra : Not like I didn't warn the boss, but... hard to believe Vendetta 's already starting a war. Widowmaker : She may be extreme, but I cannot fault her for knowing where she stands. Sombra : Are you kidding me? She blew up Overwatch . Widowmaker : She took action. That is more than Doomfist can claim.

Sombra : So you didn't want to stick around and see what a mess V makes of the place either, huh? Widowmaker : No. I know a sinking ship when I see one. Sombra : *sigh* I just hope she doesn't take everyone down with her.
Winston : How are you bypassing device firewalls? Localized microbursts of EMPs? Sombra : You know I'm not going to tell you. Winston : Controlled zero-point energy fluctuations? Sombra : Stop it!
Sombra: Peeked at your grades. Pretty good for someone studying through a Null Sector attack. Wuyang: Thanks! Honestly, I'm pretty proud of-- oh, HEY! That's private! Sombra: Not to me.
Sombra : When's our next round of hide and seek? Zarya : Everything's a game to you. Sombra : You're just tired of losing.

Sombra : Bet you omnics are great gamblers. Zenyatta : Why do you believe so? Sombra : Built-in poker faces! Zenyatta : True. It also makes us great teachers, for we can easily hide our disappointment.
map-specific: I wonder what the landlord's password is. Hah... *tch tch* So simple! Let's change that for you.
Let's order some pizza for the neighborhood. And pay their rent. *gasp* And all their debt!
The network security here is so soft and cute. It's like hacking a marshmallow.
The raid leader in the gaming café upstairs is so rude. Oh no! His computer crashed...
This song library is too small. Hah! No problem. I'll add some chiptunes.
Why would I sing this little song when I can make the world sing for me?
Anyone want drinks? They're on Max's tab! *laughs*
I don't... want to stick around here. Something in the air makes my eyes water...
You guys ever drink this Don Rumbotico? Euch... the old stuff was way better.
Ay, these horror flicks. Can't believe they're making another Rise of the Zomnics . * gasp * Wait... in 5D?!
That's something you don't see every day.
What news on the Rrrrrrialto! *coughs* Sorry.
Looks like Gibraltar's back online... with lots of new intel to share.
Sometimes I wish Overwatch would come back just so I could get some new intel from this ghost town.
